india_trends.title: Stocks to buy under ₹100: Sumeet Bagadia recommends three stocks to buy on Monday - 27 April 2026
india_trends.summary: The Indian stock ended the week on a weak note on Friday. Check Sumeet Bagadia's outlook for the market in the coming with, along with the three stocks under ₹200 that he feels are a buy in current situation.

india_trends.title: Nissan Is Betting on ‘China Speed’ to Get Back on Its Feet
india_trends.summary: Nissan Motor Co. is counting on China to reverse its fortunes after headwinds in the US and Japan left the carmaker searching for a way to regain its footing.

india_trends.title: PJSC MGKL becomes first Russian publicly listed co to get global scale issuer rating in India
india_trends.summary: PJSC MGKL, Russia’s first publicly listed resale operator, has received a ‘CareEdge B-/Stable’ global long-term issuer rating from CareEdge Global IFSC Limited, becoming the first Russian firm to be rated in India.

india_trends.title: Maximum Mumbai: India's financial capital is seeing its biggest infrastructure push yet. But, is it enough?
india_trends.summary: Mumbai is undergoing an unprecedented infrastructure push in the 2020s, with over $60 billion being invested in metro networks, expressways, a new airport, and regional connectivity projects, marking what could be a defining decade for the city’s transformation.

india_trends.title: The FTA cautionary tale: What India-Korea trade warns us about new global deals
india_trends.summary: In their bilateral trade pact, South Korea has gained significantly more than India. As it enters more such pacts, India would do well to review where it fell short with South Korea and why.

india_trends.title: Avataar Venture Partners expects three IPOs from first two funds by 2028
india_trends.summary: The growth-stage investor is pivoting toward deeptech and AI for its $400 million third fund, even as it targets a string of public listings to return capital from its first vehicle.

india_trends.title: Trump’s Hormuz blockade has deepened a historic shipping crisis
india_trends.summary: The Strait of Hormuz has effectively shut to global shipping after the US, led by Donald Trump, imposed a blockade on Iran-linked vessels, triggering retaliation from Tehran and bringing daily ship transits close to zero from a normal of about 135.

india_trends.title: FM Nirmala Sitharaman pushes unified KYC framework, asks Sebi to lead
india_trends.summary: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman called for a single know-your-customer system across the financial sector. She asked the Securities and Exchange Board of India to lead this initiative. The minister also urged Sebi to focus on future risks. These include artificial intelligence misuse and cyber t

india_trends.title: ET Awards 2025 | Fundamentals sound but money markets work their way: FM Sitharaman on FDI outflows
Kedaara picks up 5% in Axis Finance for Rs750 crore, sets benchmark for IPO-headed NBFC
india_trends.summary: Axis Finance has raised Rs750 crore from Kedaara Capital for a 5.08% stake, marking its first external funding. This capital boost strengthens its financial base as it jostles in India's extremely competitive credit market—preparing for a future IPO under regulatory requirements.

india_trends.title: IDFC First Bank says ₹590 crore fraud impact behind it, sees strong FY27 growth
india_trends.summary: The lender said new business remained unaffected during the March quarter, though profit fell sequentially after it fully expensed the fraud hit and incurred higher costs.

india_trends.title: Transition at Sonata: Rajsekhar Datta Roy is new CEO as Samir Dhar steps down
india_trends.summary: Sonata haild Roy for being instrumental in guiding the company's AI-first evolution. He has led efforts in advancing a Responsible AI approach, the company said.

india_trends.title: Tell us what you need to invest more: FM Sitharaman to India Inc
india_trends.summary: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman pledges government support for farmers facing rising input costs. She urges Indian industry to expand and add capacity, promising a patient hearing for their needs. The minister also discusses capital outflows and India's readiness for reforms. Engagement with the

india_trends.title: Axis Finance raises Rs 750 crore from Kedaara Capital via preferential issuance
india_trends.summary: Axis Finance has secured Rs 750 crore from Kedaara Capital through a preferential issuance. This investment follows a Rs 1,500 crore infusion from Axis Bank. The capital boost will strengthen Axis Finance's financial base and fuel its expansion. The company serves retail, MSME, and wholesale loan se

india_trends.title: Axis Bank frontloads FY27 provisions amid West Asia war uncertainty
india_trends.summary: The private-sector lender set aside a one-time ₹2,001 crore buffer in Q4, citing macro and geopolitical risks, even as higher provisions weigh on profit and margins face near-term pressure.

india_trends.title: India's financial system and external sector remain resilient despite global volatility and capital outflows: RBI Bulletin
india_trends.summary: The RBI noted that key external sector vulnerability indicators "remained contained" and foreign exchange reserves continued to remain "comfortable" even amid heightened global uncertainty.
